title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates
company: Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates:
Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates!
